title: code generated by `write_cxxrtl` fails to compile with big arguments to `$write`
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.45 (git sha1 9ed031ddd588442f22be13ce608547a5809b62f0, g++ 13.3.0 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Running the following script: 
```
read_verilog -sv << EOT
module top(input wire [32:0] a);
    always_comb begin
        $write("%0d\n", $unsigned(a));
    end
endmodule
EOT
write_cxxrtl top.cpp
!clang++ -I$(yosys-config --datdir)/include/backends/cxxrtl/runtime/  -std=c++17 top.cpp
```

### Expected Behavior

The compiler complains about not having a `main` function, but is otherwise happy with the generated code.

### Actual Behavior

```
/nix/store/z26qm52mxlvk1gskbp6k7yp8lg1dl0qd-yosys-0.45/share/yosys/include/backends/cxxrtl/runtime/cxxrtl/cxxrtl.h:155:17: error: static assertion failed due to requirement 'std::numeric_limits<unsigned int>::digits >= 33UL': get<T>() requires T to be at least as wide as the value is
  155 |                 static_assert(std::numeric_limits<IntegerT>::digits >= Bits,
      |                               ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/nix/store/z26qm52mxlvk1gskbp6k7yp8lg1dl0qd-yosys-0.45/share/yosys/include/backends/cxxrtl/runtime/cxxrtl/cxxrtl.h:1130:39: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'cxxrtl::value<33>::get<unsigned int, 0>' requested here
 1130 |                                 uint32_t codepoint = val.template get<uint32_t>();
      |                                                                   ^
top.cpp:62:116: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'cxxrtl::fmt_part::render<33UL>' requested here
   62 |                                         buf += fmt_part { fmt_part::INTEGER, "", fmt_part::NUMERIC, (char)48, 0, 10, 0, fmt_part::MINUS, 0, 0, 0, 0 }.render(arg0, performer);
      |                                                                                                                                                       ^
/nix/store/z26qm52mxlvk1gskbp6k7yp8lg1dl0qd-yosys-0.45/share/yosys/include/backends/cxxrtl/runtime/cxxrtl/cxxrtl.h:155:55: note: expression evaluates to '32 >= 33'
  155 |                 static_assert(std::numeric_limits<IntegerT>::digits >= Bits,
      |                               ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~
1 error generated.
ERROR: Shell command returned error code 256.
```
code_blocks:
read_verilog -sv << EOT
module top(input wire [32:0] a);
    always_comb begin
        $write("%0d\n", $unsigned(a));
    end
endmodule
EOT
write_cxxrtl top.cpp
!clang++ -I$(yosys-config --datdir)/include/backends/cxxrtl/runtime/  -std=c++17 top.cpp

/nix/store/z26qm52mxlvk1gskbp6k7yp8lg1dl0qd-yosys-0.45/share/yosys/include/backends/cxxrtl/runtime/cxxrtl/cxxrtl.h:155:17: error: static assertion failed due to requirement 'std::numeric_limits<unsigned int>::digits >= 33UL': get<T>() requires T to be at least as wide as the value is
  155 |                 static_assert(std::numeric_limits<IntegerT>::digits >= Bits,
      |                               ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/nix/store/z26qm52mxlvk1gskbp6k7yp8lg1dl0qd-yosys-0.45/share/yosys/include/backends/cxxrtl/runtime/cxxrtl/cxxrtl.h:1130:39: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'cxxrtl::value<33>::get<unsigned int, 0>' requested here
 1130 |                                 uint32_t codepoint = val.template get<uint32_t>();
      |                                                                   ^
top.cpp:62:116: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'cxxrtl::fmt_part::render<33UL>' requested here
   62 |                                         buf += fmt_part { fmt_part::INTEGER, "", fmt_part::NUMERIC, (char)48, 0, 10, 0, fmt_part::MINUS, 0, 0, 0, 0 }.render(arg0, performer);
      |                                                                                                                                                       ^
/nix/store/z26qm52mxlvk1gskbp6k7yp8lg1dl0qd-yosys-0.45/share/yosys/include/backends/cxxrtl/runtime/cxxrtl/cxxrtl.h:155:55: note: expression evaluates to '32 >= 33'
  155 |                 static_assert(std::numeric_limits<IntegerT>::digits >= Bits,
      |                               ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^~~~~~~
1 error generated.
ERROR: Shell command returned error code 256.
